note: DynamicHistogram (Task C2), the Monte Carlo result accumulator. Constructed directly like ShiftedGamma/PearsonIII/Empirical/ConvergenceCriteria (not via IDistributionFactory): DynamicHistogram(bin_width, ConvergenceCriteria()), then AddObservationsToHistogram(data), then AddObservationToHistogram(x) for each x in `added`. Method keys: min -> Min, max -> Max, sample_mean -> SampleMean (raw running mean), mean -> HistogramMean() (mean computed from the binned histogram), histogram_standard_deviation -> HistogramStandardDeviation(), standard_deviation -> StandardDeviation (raw running sqrt of the divide-by-(n-1)-rescaled variance), pdf/cdf/inverse_cdf take one scalar arg from `args`. Expected values are the InlineData literals from HistogramTests.cs, except `mean` (HistogramMean() for the uniform 1..5 data == 3.5 exactly; no dedicated InlineData literal for HistogramMean, emitter-verified). Tolerances map the C# assertion modes: Assert.Equal(exp, act) exact double equality -> mode exact; Assert.Equal(exp, act, 3) (3-decimal rounding) -> abs 5e-4; Assert.Equal(exp, act, 5) -> abs 5e-6; the pdf/cdf/inverse_cdf tests use err = |exp-act|/|exp| < 0.01 -> mode rel tol 0.01.
